sd.bio: Results-driven Digital Marketing Strategist with expertise in content marketing, SEO, social media growth, and brand positioning. I specialize in building high-converting content strategies, performance-driven campaigns, and scalable online presence for startups and growing brands. With hands-on experience in website optimization, CRM systems, and engagement marketing, I focus on delivering measurable growth and ROI.
